label: lattice theory
evidence: Lattice theory = order-theoretic lattices; Mathlib/Order/Lattice is the dedicated folder (join/meet, distributive, modular lattices).
verify_note: hierarchy ok (252); Lattice.lean=(semi)lattices+distrib; modular in sibling ModularLattice (evidence nit); QID=field

label: lattice theory
evidence: Complete-lattice theory (infinite joins/meets, Galois connections) is the other core pillar of lattice theory, in its own folder.
verify_note: hierarchy ok (543); Defs.lean=CompleteLattice/sSup/iSup, 2nd pillar of lattice theory; multi-path per precedent

label: topos theory
evidence: Dedicated Mathlib/CategoryTheory/Topos folder formalizes elementary topos structure (subobject classifier etc.), the standard formal home for topos theory.
verify_note: hierarchy ok (104@pin); Sheaf.lean=sheaf-topos classifiers; Classifier now deprecated->Subobject/Classifier; sole home

label: topos theory
evidence: Grothendieck topos theory (sheaves on sites) is formalized in CategoryTheory/Sites, complementing the elementary-topos folder.
verify_note: hierarchy ok (3344); Grothendieck topologies/sheafification/Coherent = Grothendieck topos machinery; QID=topos theory

label: categorical topology
evidence: Categorical topology studies topological spaces via category-theoretic structure (Top, CompHaus, Profinite as categories) - matches Mathlib/Topology/Category.
verify_note: hierarchy ok (1213); Compactum(monad algebras)/CompHaus/Locale = categorical topology; QID descr-less but label exact

label: differential algebra
evidence: Mathlib/FieldTheory/Differential formalizes differential fields (derivations, differential Galois groups), the field's core Mathlib content though scope is narrower than full differential-algebra (differential rings/modules).
verify_note: folder=diff FIELDS (26 decls), accepted home of diff Galois Q2383624; diff algebra broader (RingTheory/Derivation=146)

label: theory of differential equations
evidence: Mathlib/Analysis/ODE (Picard-Lindelof existence/uniqueness, Gronwall) covers ordinary differential equations; no PDE folder exists so this covers only part of the field's standard scope.
verify_note: broad field incl PDE pinned to ODE-only folder (93 decls); evidence concedes partial scope; belongs to ODE-theory QID

label: global analysis
evidence: Global analysis generalizes calculus/analysis to manifolds; Mathlib/Geometry/Manifold (smooth structures, MFDeriv, vector bundles, PDE-adjacent tools) is the closest tight formal home.
verify_note: hierarchy ok (3151); QID=WD duplicate of Q17017346 (accepted, same path); desc=analysis on manifolds, folder matches

label: fixed point theory
evidence: Order-theoretic fixed-point theorems (Knaster-Tarski etc.) are in Mathlib/Order/FixedPoints, one of the field's classical branches.
verify_note: hierarchy ok (45); FixedPoints.lean=lfp/gfp+Knaster-Tarski = order branch of FPT; QID=fixed point theory, P31 field

label: fixed point theory
evidence: Dynamical-systems fixed-point results (periodic points etc.) live in Mathlib/Dynamics/FixedPoints, another core branch of fixed point theory.
verify_note: hierarchy ok (34); IsFixedPt/Topology.lean=dynamical FPT; periodic pts in sibling PeriodicPts (evidence nit)

label: summability theory
evidence: Mathlib/Topology/Algebra/InfiniteSum formalizes summability of infinite families (HasSum/Summable), the field's standard formal treatment in Mathlib.
verify_note: QID desc=summing nonconvergent seqs (divergent-series methods); InfiniteSum=HasSum/Summable convergence: wrong meaning
